descriptionShort: Vernon Lakers defeat defending Centennial Cup champion Richmond Sockeyes 9-6 to win BCJHL playoff series 4-1.
descriptionLong: Vernon Lakers defeated the defending Centennial Cup champion Richmond Sockeyes 9-6 to clinch the best-of-seven BCJHL final series 4-1 in Vernon. Prince George also advanced in Peace-Cariboo Junior Hockey League playoffs, with the series tied 1-1. The winner meets Vernon in the Mowat Cup final.

attribution.headline: Vernon Lakers Defeat Richmond Sockeyes in BCJHL Final
